title: niphobolus davidii
intro: Niphobolus davidii, also known as Nephrolepis exaltata or the ruffled sword fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that aid in wound healing. The health benefits of Niphobolus davidii include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
